summary: Several files contain large functions and duplicate logic, which can be refactored to improve maintainability and readability.

action_items.description: [high] runtime/tools/virtual_account.py: The `run_virtual_account` function is 152 lines long, which is quite large for a single function. — Consider breaking down the function into smaller, more focused functions.
[high] runtime/skills/market_scan.py: The `run` method in `market_scan.py` is 81 lines long. — Refactor the `run` method into smaller functions to improve readability and maintainability.
[high] runtime/orchestrators/dev_automation.py: The `run_repo_monitor` function is 63 lines long. — Break down the `run_repo_monitor` function into smaller, more focused functions.
[high] runtime/tools/xp.py: The `grant_skill_xp` function is 109 lines long. — Refactor the `grant_skill_xp` function into smaller, more focused functions.
[high] runtime/tools/jobs.py: The `fetch_adzuna` function is 68 lines long. — Break down the `fetch_adzuna` function into smaller, more focused functions.
[high] runtime/skills/hard_filter.py: The `run` method in `hard_filter.py` is 88 lines long. — Refactor the `run` method into smaller functions to improve readability and maintainability.
